data.description: S.Korea Trade Minister: There is no written agreement regarding Korea-US trade deal.

data.title: President Bukele of El Salvador granted indefinite reelection and extended terms to 6 years, amid criticism for authoritarian tendencies.
data.description: El Salvador has recently passed a law allowing for President Bukele to seek reelection indefinitely, while also extending presidential terms from four to six years. This move has generated criticism from various quarters, with critics voicing concerns about the potential increase in authoritarianism within the country.

data.title: Squarespace named best website creator for 2025 by Software Experts.
data.description: In a recent report by Software Experts, Squarespace has been acknowledged as the top all-in-one website builder for 2025. This recognition solidifies Squarespace's position as the best platform for digital presence and brand creation this year. With its user-friendly interface and innovative features, Squarespace has surpassed its competitors and stands out as the go-to choice for individuals and businesses looking to establish a strong online presence. The report highlights Squarespace's comprehensive tools and templates that cater to a wide range of users, making it the preferred website creation platform for many.

data.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals expected to report Q2 earnings of $8.43 per share and revenue of $3.28 billion, down from last year.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on Friday, Aug. 1. Analysts predict earnings of $8.43 per share, a decrease from $11.56 per share last year. The company, headquartered in Tarrytown, New York, is expected to report quarterly revenue of $3.28 billion, down from $3.55 billion in the previous year. The U.S. FDA recently granted accelerated approval to Regeneron's Lynozyfic for adult patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma who have undergone at least four prior lines of therapy. Share prices for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals closed at $545.46, a 1.6% decrease, on Thursday. For more details, refer to Benzinga's website.

data.title: TAT launches "Your Dream of Thailand Academy" campaign to celebrate Grand Tourism and Sports Year 2025.
data.description: In Bangkok on August 1, 2025, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) announced the launch of the "Your Dream of Thailand Academy" campaign as part of the Grand Tourism and Sports Year 2025 celebration. This initiative, themed Thai'd Up This Summer, aims to showcase the country's diverse tourism offerings.

data.title: Kia America reports 12% rise in July sales, with retail sales up 9%. Year-to-date sales up 8% over 2024 record pace. Carnival, Sportage, Telluride achieve highest-ever July sales.
data.description: Kia dealerships reported a 9% increase in retail sales for July compared to the previous year, marking their best-ever July performance. Year-to-date, Kia sales have risen by 8% over the record set in 2024. The models Carnival, Sportage, and Telluride saw their highest-ever July sales. This data comes from Kia's headquarters in Irvine, California, as of August 1, 2025.
